title: Sundial — website hero (demo sample #2)
story: Calm, premium website-hero loop for a CLEARLY FICTIONAL demo startup, 'Sundial — time tracking that gets out of your way.' Warm, editorial, unhurried — the opposite of a hype social clip. Beats: brand wordmark fades in → headline 'Time tracking that gets out of your way' → a calm product dashboard mock floats in (a week view, auto-tracked hours, one sage progress ring) → soft CTA 'Start free'. No voiceover (music + type only). Loopable. It's a design demo: benefit copy only, NO fake stats or social-proof numbers, no claims about a real company.

source.text: A serene SaaS hero. Register: warm editorial, confident, quiet luxury (think a beautifully-set magazine spread, not a billboard). Fictional product Sundial = effortless time tracking that disappears into your day. Recurring images: sun/dial, a calm weekly dashboard, soft light. Emotion: relief, calm, trust. Everything benefit-led; nothing quantified as a real metric.

audience: founders, product teams browsing a SaaS landing page
